hero.headline: [el] Santorini, Without the Logistics.
hero.sub: [el] Mercedes-Benz transfers and curated tours of the island. Fixed prices, meet-and-greet service, available 24/7.

why.heading: [el] Fixed Prices. Mercedes Fleet. Every Day of the Year.

items.title: [el] Fixed Prices
items.body: [el] The price you're quoted is the price you pay.

items.title: [el] 24/7 Service
items.body: [el] Late-night ferry, 5am flight — we dispatch anytime.

items.title: [el] Card Payments
items.body: [el] All major cards accepted. No processing fees.

tours.heading: [el] Four Ways to See the Island
tours.sub: [el] Pair any of these with a transfer and we handle the day.

fleet.heading: [el] Our Mercedes-Benz Lineup
fleet.sub: [el] Every vehicle climate-controlled and newly maintained.

hero.headline: [el] Transfers Handled, Arrivals Felt.
hero.sub: [el] Airport, port, hotel, wedding, or an all-day driver. Same fleet, same drivers, same fixed prices.

services.title: [el] Airport Transfers
services.body: [el] Meet-and-greet at JTR arrivals, luggage assistance, direct to your accommodation.

services.title: [el] Port Transfers
services.body: [el] Coordinated with cruise arrivals at Athinios.

services.title: [el] Hotel-to-Hotel
services.body: [el] Changing properties mid-stay? We move you and your bags door-to-door.

services.title: [el] Wedding Transfers
services.body: [el] Full fleet available for wedding parties.

services.title: [el] Beach & Evening
services.body: [el] Daytime beach runs, evening transfers, late-night returns.

services.title: [el] 24-Hour Driver
services.body: [el] Your dedicated driver and Mercedes for the day.

hero.headline: [el] Mercedes-Benz, Across the Size Spectrum.
hero.sub: [el] Newly maintained, fully insured, climate-controlled. Chosen for comfort on narrow island roads.

vehicles.note: [el] The default for singles and pairs. Leather, quiet cabin, generous legroom.
[el] Luxury MPV. Walk-up entry, individual seats, huge boot.

vehicles.ideal: [el] Wedding groups, corporate arrivals, friend trips.
vehicles.note: [el] Leather captain seats, air-conditioning, Wi-Fi available.
[el] Our largest. Fleet-maintained, backed by a second vehicle if needed.

hero.headline: [el] Built on the Island. Run by Locals.
hero.sub: [el] Santorini Imperial is a small team of licensed operators who happen to love the island enough to show up at 3am so you don't have to worry about your ride.

pillars.title: [el] Local
pillars.body: [el] We live here. Every driver, every guide, every booking confirmation. You are never routed through a foreign call centre.

pillars.title: [el] Mercedes only
pillars.body: [el] A single, maintained fleet — because consistency is what separates a ride from a transfer.

pillars.title: [el] Fixed-price, always
pillars.body: [el] The quote is the price. No surge hours, no surprise luggage fees, no change at the door.

hero.headline: [el] Tell Us Your Plan.
hero.sub: [el] Fill the form or reach us directly — we reply within the hour during daylight and within four hours overnight.
